name: STS2 Co-op Test Kit
author: inggom
description: In-game diagnostics for testing STS2 co-op / multiplayer mods, meant to pair with a two-instance local co-op setup. Console: sc_probe (dump net type, players & NetIds), sc_swap <netid> (change the local-player perspective). Also patches the lobby so a solo host can begin a multiplayer-type run for solo smoke-testing. Dev tool — not a gameplay mod.
